outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran fires 4 missile salvos at Tel Aviv in 40 minutes as Trump says war 'won'
outlets.summary: CNN liveblog covers Iran's 80th wave of attacks — four successive missile salvos hitting Tel Aviv metro area in 40 minutes — just hours after Trump declared the war 'won.' Iran also formally rejected the US 15-point peace plan with 5 counter-conditions including Hormuz sovereignty.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran rejects Trump's proposal to end the war and lays out 5 conditions
outlets.summary: NPR reports Iran's formal rejection of the US 15-point peace plan and Araghchi's 5 counter-conditions, including the unprecedented demand for international recognition of Iran's authority over the Strait of Hormuz.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: US offers ceasefire plan but Iran says Washington in no position to negotiate
outlets.summary: WaPo covers the 15-point US ceasefire plan delivered via Pakistan, with Iran's military spokesman dismissing US diplomatic efforts and demanding base closures and war reparations.

outlets.name: Washington Post (Opinion)
outlets.headline: Iran will wage its next war against its own citizens
outlets.summary: WaPo opinion argues that regardless of the war's outcome, Iran's regime will turn inward to suppress domestic dissent, drawing parallels to post-war crackdowns in previous conflicts.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran rejects Trump peace plan, demands Hormuz sovereignty and war reparations
outlets.summary: Fox News frames Iran's formal rejection of the 15-point US peace plan as proof of Iranian bad faith — reporting on the five counter-conditions including Hormuz sovereignty and war reparations demands that US officials call 'ridiculous and unrealistic.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran may target desalination plants within days, UN official warns
outlets.summary: Fox News reports a UN official warning that Iran may target desalination plants across the Gulf region, raising the specter of a water crisis affecting millions.

outlets.name: Newsmax
outlets.headline: Wall Street Falls on Worries About War, Interest Rates
outlets.summary: Newsmax reports on Wall Street declines driven by war uncertainty and interest rate concerns, with investors uncertain about the economic fallout from the Iran conflict.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: My Honest Take On The War In Iran
outlets.summary: Daily Wire opinion piece offers a conservative assessment of the Iran war, weighing military achievements against growing domestic opposition and economic costs.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran formally rejects US peace plan; IRGC fires Wave 80 at Tel Aviv; Philippines declares energy emergency
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera's Day 26 PM liveblog covers Iran's formal 5-condition rejection of the US peace plan, IRGC Wave 80 four-salvo attack on Tel Aviv metro, Hezbollah commander killed in Lebanon, and the Philippines declaring a national energy emergency.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Is Iran's negotiating position stronger?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera analyzes whether Iran's negotiating leverage has increased despite military losses, citing its resilience, Hormuz blockade, and global economic disruption as bargaining chips.

outlets.name: Reuters / Military.com
outlets.headline: Iran receives US ceasefire plan as strikes batter Middle East
outlets.summary: Reuters/AP reports on the 15-point US ceasefire plan delivered to Iran via Pakistan, while strikes continue to batter the Middle East on all fronts.

outlets.name: ITV News
outlets.headline: US issues 15-point ceasefire plan but Iran insists not in talks
outlets.summary: ITV covers the disconnect between the US ceasefire plan and Iran's continued public insistence that no negotiations are taking place.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IRGC Wave 80 strikes; Hezbollah anti-tank commander killed; first ballistic missile intercepted over Lebanon
outlets.summary: Times of Israel afternoon liveblog: IRGC Wave 80 hits Tel Aviv metro with 4 successive salvos, IDF kills Hezbollah commander Hassan Kamal Halawi in Qaaqaait al-Jisr drone strike, 5th Litani bridge destroyed, and — for the first time — an Iranian ballistic missile was intercepted over Lebanese airspace.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu Says Trump Sees Opportunity for Agreement
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports Netanyahu acknowledging Trump's diplomatic push for an agreement, while Israeli military officials stress they need more weeks to achieve operational objectives.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Israel announces territorial seizure to Litani
outlets.summary: JPost covers Israel's formal announcement of occupying southern Lebanon to the Litani River, with Defense Minister Katz citing the 'Rafah model' and Smotrich calling for annexation.

outlets.name: Haaretz (Opinion)
outlets.headline: From War of Independence to Iran, one battle after another
outlets.summary: Haaretz opinion piece places the Iran war in the broader arc of Israeli military history, questioning whether perpetual conflict has become the defining feature of the state.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran vows to make US, Israel regret aggression; China urges end to bullying
outlets.summary: Press TV leads with Iran's defiant vow alongside China's statement urging an end to 'bullying,' framing the conflict as US-Israeli aggression against a sovereign nation.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran air defenses down US cruise missiles near Tehran
outlets.summary: Press TV claims Iranian air defenses successfully intercepted US cruise missiles near Tehran and Markazi Province, emphasizing Iran's defensive capabilities.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran rejects US proposal, lays out five conditions for ending the imposed war
outlets.summary: Press TV leads with Iran's formal rejection of the US 15-point 'imposed war' ceasefire plan, presenting Araghchi's 5 counter-conditions as Iran's righteous response to 'US-Israeli aggression.' Also announces Wave 80 operation targeting Israel and US Gulf bases.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran does not seek ceasefire but war must end
outlets.summary: Iran International reports Iran's contradictory messaging: publicly rejecting ceasefire while acknowledging the war must end, reflecting the dual-track diplomatic approach.
